description_long: This is a tall, rectangular outdoor trash bin with a robust, angular design, primarily colored in dark green. The bin features decorative leaf motifs in yellow and light green on its lower front and sides, adding an eco-friendly aesthetic suitable for parks or urban green spaces. The top section is slightly domed and reinforced with angular edges, and the front and rear panels have black arrow graphics indicating the direction of waste disposal. The opening is located beneath the domed top, likely covered by a swing or hinged lid for depositing trash. There are no visible handles or wheels, suggesting it is designed to remain stationary. The surface appears to be made of powder-coated metal, providing durability and weather resistance.
description: A tall, dark green metal trash bin with decorative leaf motifs and a domed top, designed for outdoor urban or park use. It features black arrow graphics and a likely swing or hinged lid for waste disposal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black arrow graphics above the waste slot and decorative leaf motifs on the lower left.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain green panel and partial leaf motif, no visible opening or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view with black arrow graphics, a stylized plant motif, and leaf decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain green panel and a full view of the plant and leaf motif, no visible opening.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: black arrow graphics indicating waste disposal direction; no recycling or waste type labels
